name: S-104
events: 20 Jun 1944 S-104 torpedoed and sank the German auxiliary submarine chaser UJ 1209 (542 GRT) off the Tanafjord about 13 nautical miles north-west of Berlev?g, Norway in position 71°01'N, 28°38'E.

12 Oct 1944 S-104 attacked a German convoy with four torpedoes east of the Tanafjord. The German merchant Lumme (1730 GRT) is hit and sank 3 nautical miles north of Berlev?g, Norway in position 70°55'N, 29°07'E.
15 Oct 1944 S-104 attacked a German convoy of the Tanafjord. Four torpedoes are fired but none found a target.
